ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race track */,
  "going" TEXT /* Going type of the race track */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time for the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., sprint, distance) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track where the race is held */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, finished, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greyhounds" (
  "greyhound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each greyhound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the greyhound */,
  "sire_name" TEXT /* Sire name of the greyhound */,
  "dam_name" TEXT /* Dam name of the greyhound */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the greyhound in kg */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the greyhound in years */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the greyhound */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the greyhound (e.g., male, female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the greyhound */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the greyhound started racing */,
  "career_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the greyhound retired (if applicable) */,
  "performance_history" TEXT /* Historical performance data (e.g., past race results, injuries) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greyhound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race in which the result was recorded */,
  "greyhound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the greyhound that participated in the race */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position finished by the greyhound */,
  "win_time" REAL /* Winning time of the greyhound */,
  "prize" REAL /* Prize money awarded to the greyhound */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race at the time of the result (e.g., finished, cancelled) */,
  "race_conditions" TEXT /* Additional conditions that affected the race (e.g., strong headwind) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_greyhound_id FOREIGN KEY ("greyhound_id") REFERENCES greyhounds ("greyhound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person placing the bet */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race being bet on */,
  "greyhound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the greyhound being bet on */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money placed on the bet */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds associated with the bet */,
  "bet_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, won, lost) */,
  "payout_amount" REAL /* Amount paid out if the bet was successful */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., win, place, show) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_greyhound_id FOREIGN KEY ("greyhound_id") REFERENCES greyhounds ("greyhound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, owner, bettor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the race track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race track */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of race track (e.g., Sand, Turf) */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in meters */,
  "track_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the track in meters */,
  "track_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of greyhounds the track can accommodate */,
  "track_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the track opened */,
  "track_status" TEXT /* Current status of the track (e.g., open, closed for maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the trainer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the trainer's greyhounds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainer's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainer's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greyhound_trainer" (
  "greyhound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the greyhound */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer responsible for the greyhound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greyhound_id", "trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greyhound_owner" (
  "greyhound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the greyhound */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the greyhound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("greyhound_id", "owner_id")
)
